text: we'd like to help companies secure themselves and we think it's important to start work on this quickly

Codex 越来越猛了，昨天更新增加了内置的谷歌浏览器插件，可以直接控制你的谷歌浏览器执行任务。

而且它可以在后台跨浏览器页面并行工作，不耽误你正常使用浏览器。所谓“并行工作”，指的是你可以启动多个子 SubAgent 帮你操作多个网页。

我试了一下，发现最厉害的一点是：它不仅可以控制 https://t.co/HkNRiEaQMV
而且它会开一个分组，让你能找到它正在控制哪个网页，无论是在 Chrome 还是其他支持 Tab 分组的浏览器里

这有点牛P

OpenAI 上架了 Codex for Chrome 浏览器扩展

让 Codex 可以直接操作你已登录的网站，执行任务。

它用的是你已经登录好的 Chrome，所以那些需要账号才能进的后台、CRM、公司内部系统，它都能直接进去操作

不用你重新登录或者给它密码... https://t.co/L4d4VxJJHQ
插件下载链接：https://t.co/kEiA2SZmnW https://t.co/GN6EpGLfs0
然后在 codex 设置→ 电脑操控 中安装启用 https://t.co/jYuICmSoJj

OpenAI 发布了 GPT-Realtime-2，这是其迄今为止最智能的语音模型。

该模型具备 GPT-5 级别的推理能力、128,000 个 token 的上下文窗口，并支持调节“投入程度”以实现更自然的对话体验。

它可与 GPT-Realtime-Translate 配合使用，实现将 70 多种输入语言实时翻译为 13 种输出语言；亦可搭配
Gemini Enterprise 中的“代理中心”（Agent Gallery）是您团队所需各类代理的一站式汇聚之地——无论这些代理是由 Google 构建、由贵公司内部开发，还是通过我们的合作伙伴发掘而来！
Responses to this post are gold

Great thing about Claude is that you can ask it once and for all to never use em dash in your writing. 

Here's a simple prompt how to add it to your memory. 

prompt: Dash always gives away it was written by AI. Add it to your instructions to never use it and avoid it. https://t.co/cuzcETFPtc
Hitler was a socialist, therefore all socialists are Hitler … ?

Professions with guilds or membership associations are going to get different AI policy reactions than those without

The Bar & the AMA will ensure that human doctors or lawyers are legally required for key activities. There is no equivalent organization for consultants or coders

Unions often push back against automation, often successfully (see self-driving car fights).

But just wait until you see what happens when highly connected, wealthy, and organized white collar workers feel like their jobs are threatened by AI.
A machine that can replace all US white collar work by 2035 will, in no way, be allowed to replace all US white collar work by 2035

I have always found it charming that the fourth, fifth and sixth derivatives of position are snap, crackle, and pop. Because I could, I asked Codex to throw together a little simulation so you can play with them (as well as velocity, acceleration & jerk). https://t.co/P9zGpIeQBb https://t.co/vF9edDWHgm
I only did cursory checks, but seems good enough for the intended purpose. Don't use it to teach high school physics without doing more verification work.
Delighted to inform you that @Waymo merch has landed in SF 🙌 https://t.co/oO1SKFMV1p

Recently discovered I have spent the equivalent of 11 days inside a Waymo (!!)

And realistically this number is meaningfully higher given the rides I hitch off @omooretweets. https://t.co/yfxggJ91w3

Google 刚刚推出了一款无屏幕 Fitbit 运动手环

戴一周不用充电
充电也快，5 分钟回血一整天电量

整块设备只有 5 克
专心干一件事：24 小时贴在你手腕上记录身体状况

它能测的东西不少：
心率、心律（带房颤警报）、血氧、皮肤温度、睡眠分期、心率变异性、运动数据，全自动识别，不用手动开。

50 https://t.co/8B9tVkBEYp

硬件 99 美元（一次性）+ 可选订阅 9.99 美元/月
比 Whoop 年费便宜一半多
比 Oura 硬件便宜三分之二
传感器配置和两家相当 https://t.co/ojuO3wgPyf

真正的杀招在背后：

搭配 Gemini 驱动的 Google Health Coach，能根据你的睡眠和运动数据给你定制的建议

例如：拍一张健身房器械的照片就能帮你生成训练计划。

订购链接：https://t.co/gOsoaOIcnh https://t.co/xGoe6JBtU0

The Granularity Axis: A Micro-to-Macro Latent Direction for Social Roles in LLMs

我们正在演进 Gemini 交互 API，以支持丰富且多步的智能体工作流。

不再局限于严格的“用户”与“模型”角色划分，如今，每一个动作（从思考到工具调用）都被表示为一个独立的步骤。
RT @icreatelife: Prove you work with AI with just one phrase
